ABOUT
01

About Us

The Story
Behind Krevon

Nikhil Patel

Founder & Creative Director

Krevon Media Agency

“I founded Krevon Media Agency to bring world-class brand building to every ambitious business. From identity to campaigns — we handle it all so your brand can grow.”

Based in Mahesana

Born local, built global. We understand local markets while delivering world-class brand results.

Strategy-First

Every brand starts with deep research. No guesswork — only data-driven strategies that actually work.

Proven Results

20+ brands, 50+ campaigns. A track record of turning businesses into recognized, growing brands.

Our Vision

To become Gujarat's most trusted brand building and digital marketing agency — helping every ambitious business build a strong identity and a powerful online presence.

Our Studio & Office

Krevon Media Agency (Amazing Mahesana), Silicon Sponta, 46, Radhanpur Rd, Bansari Twp, Mehsana, Gujarat 384005

What We Do

From brand identity and social media management to Meta Ads, Google Ads, podcast production, and video creation — we handle your complete brand journey. Our studio, team, and tools exist for one purpose: making your brand impossible to ignore.

Work With Us
SERVICES
02

What We Offer

Our Services

01

Brand Building

Complete brand identity: logo, visual system, color palette, typography, brand guidelines, and brand voice — everything to stand out.

02

Social Media Marketing

Full management of Instagram, Facebook & LinkedIn — content calendar, daily posting, community engagement, and growth strategy.

03

Digital Marketing

Full-funnel digital strategies that drive qualified traffic, generate leads, and convert customers across every digital channel.

04

Graphic Design

Scroll-stopping posts, banners, thumbnails, marketing creatives, and brand collateral designed to capture attention and convert.

05

Video Editing

Reels, brand films, ad creatives, and short-form content — raw footage transformed into polished, high-impact video.

06

Influencer Marketing

We connect your brand with the right creators — from nano to macro — handling outreach, briefing, and full campaign delivery.

07

Meta Ads

Facebook & Instagram paid advertising campaigns designed to maximise reach, engagement, and ROI for your brand.

08

Google Ads

Search, display & YouTube ads targeting the right audience at the right moment to drive measurable business results.

09

Video Productions

High-quality shoots, brand films, podcast videos, and corporate productions with full post-production support.

10

Marketing Strategy

Custom growth roadmaps, competitor analysis, audience research, and go-to-market strategies tailored to your brand.

Fully Managed

Complete Brand Management

We don't just run campaigns — we own your brand's growth. End-to-end management with dedicated strategy, real-time support, and transparent reporting at every step.

What's Included

  • Monthly brand health report
  • Follower & engagement analytics
  • Ad performance & ROAS tracking
  • Content calendar & approval workflow
  • Lead tracking & CRM support
  • Quarterly strategy review
Podcast Studio

Krevon Podcast Studio

World-class podcast recording in Mahesana — record, produce, and launch your voice to the world.

Now Open for Bookings

Your Story Deserves a Platform

Business owner, thought leader, or content creator — your ideas deserve to be heard. Book a session at Krevon's professional studio and reach thousands.

Book a SessionWhatsApp Us

What's Included

Studio Recording

Acoustic treatment, professional condenser mics & real-time monitoring.

Audio Editing & Mastering

Noise removal, music beds, chapter markers & broadcast-quality mastering.

Video Production

Multi-camera setup with full post-production for YouTube & Reels.

Branding & Distribution

Custom thumbnails, show branding, and publish to Spotify, Apple Podcasts & YouTube.

Ready to Start Your Podcast?

Our studio is available 7 days a week. Bring your idea — we'll handle the rest.

Book a Session

Portfolio &
Results

Brands Built

Years of Excellence
01

Fashion Brand Launch

Fashion & Lifestyle
5×

Follower Growth

Challenge

Complete identity from scratch — logo, visual system, and social presence.

Result

5× follower growth in 3 months. Brand identity recognised at a regional design showcase.

30+
Assets Created
3 mo
Timeline
02

Local Restaurant Chain

Food & Beverage
8K+

New Followers

Challenge

Build online presence and increase footfall from local audiences using organic content.

Result

Gained 8K+ followers and boosted weekly footfall by 35% in just 60 days.

+35%
Footfall
60 d
Timeline
03

Real Estate Developer

Real Estate
4×

Ad ROAS

Challenge

Generate qualified property inquiries through Meta Ads and Google Ads campaigns.

Result

4× return on ad spend with 150+ genuine leads captured in the first month.

150+
Qualified Leads
1 mo
Timeline
04

Education Institute

Education
+25%

Admissions

Challenge

Increase new-batch admissions through targeted social media and Google Ads promotions.

Result

Exceeded admission target by 25% with a focused 45-day content + ads strategy.

80+
Content Pieces
45 d
Timeline
Our Team

Meet the Team

The creative minds and strategic thinkers behind every brand we build, every campaign we run, and every result we deliver.

NP

Nikhil Patel

Founder & Creative Director

The visionary behind Krevon Media Agency. Expert in brand strategy, creative direction, and building digital presences that drive real business growth.

InstagramLinkedIn
PS

Priya Shah

Social Media Strategist

Platform algorithm expert with a track record of scaling brand accounts from zero to 10K+ followers with engaging, conversion-focused content.

InstagramLinkedIn
RM

Raj Mehta

Video Editor & Content Creator

Master of hooks, cinematic cuts, and reels that stop the scroll. Turns raw footage into viral, brand-building content every single day.

InstagramLinkedIn
AP

Aarav Patel

Brand Designer

Brand identity specialist crafting logos, visual systems, and thumb-stopping creatives that make brands impossible to ignore.

InstagramLinkedIn

Passionate about digital media? Join our team.

PLANS
05

Pricing

Choose Your
Growth Plan

Entry

Starter

The perfect entry point for businesses stepping into the digital world.

  • Brand identity consultation
  • 8 social media posts/month
  • Basic graphic design (posts & stories)
  • 4 Reels per month (edit only)
  • Monthly performance report
  • Caption & hashtag strategy
Get Started
Most Popular
Most Popular

Growth

Built for brands serious about consistent growth and a stronger digital presence.

  • Complete brand identity package
  • 15 posts/month (multi-platform)
  • Advanced graphic design & creatives
  • 8 Reels/month (shoot + edit)
  • Monthly content calendar & strategy
  • Meta Ads campaign management
  • Active audience engagement
  • Weekly performance & growth report
Get Started
Elite

Premium

For ambitious brands ready to dominate every channel and lead their market.

  • Full brand building & identity system
  • 20+ posts/month (multi-platform)
  • Cinematic video production & reels
  • Full Meta Ads + Google Ads management
  • Influencer collaboration support
  • Custom marketing strategy & roadmap
  • Priority support & dedicated brand manager
  • Bi-weekly strategy calls
Get Started

All packages include an onboarding call. Need a custom plan? Let's talk.

Let's Build Something Great
